headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on KeyCorp, Lowers Price Target to $24
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst John Pancari   maintains KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $26 to $24.

headline: Americans Respond to Financial Pressures With Smarter Spending and Increased Saving, New KeyBank Pulse Poll Finds
summary: 33% of Americans report making financial trade-offs daily, and another 31% are doing so weekly, as they adjust their financial behavior to match today's realities. CLEVELAND, OH / ACCESS Newswire / April 6, 2026 / Economic uncertainty hasn't slowed ...
